description: Public introduction to Hesbetak.AI, its accounting automation, bilingual assistant, and onboarding entry points.
controls: Get started free button: opens registration
See live demo button: scrolls or navigates to the product demonstration
Sign in navigation link: opens the login page
Language toggle: switches Arabic and English
Theme toggle: changes light, dark, or system appearance

description: Authenticate with email and password or Google, then continue to organization selection or the dashboard.
controls: Email input: accepts the account email
Password input: accepts the account password
Sign in button: validates credentials and creates a session
Continue with Google button: starts Google authentication when configured
Forgot password link: opens OTP password recovery
Sign up link: opens registration

description: Create a user account and continue through email OTP verification.
controls: Full name input: records the user's display name
Email input: records the login email
Password input: creates the password
Create account button: submits registration and sends OTP
Sign in link: returns to login
steps: Enter the OTP on Verify Email.

description: Request an OTP and set a new password for an existing account.
controls: Email input: identifies the account
Send code button: emails a reset OTP
OTP inputs: accept the verification code
Resend button: requests a replacement code
Save password button: applies the new password after verification

description: Choose which organization workspace to open or begin onboarding another organization.
controls: Organization card: activates that tenant and opens its dashboard
Create organization button: opens onboarding for a new workspace
Logout action: clears the current session
steps: Select an available organization or create a new one.

description: Collect organization details, industry, currencies, mandatory subscription selection, and Chart of Accounts preferences before creating the workspace.
controls: Continue button: validates the current step and advances
Back button: returns to the previous step
Industry cards: select business category and type
Currency cards: toggle supported currencies
Main reporting currency select: chooses the ledger currency
Regular plan card: core accounting without AI, scheduling, or forecasting
Plus plan card: adds scheduled reports and forecasting
Pro plan card: adds AI chat and automatic invoice extraction
Account switches: enable business-specific account branches
Add Account Manually button: opens the parent/code/name dialog
Edit and delete account icons: modify the preview tree
Skip and use default button: uses the default Chart of Accounts
Finish button: creates the workspace/accounts and opens Paymob checkout

description: Organization overview with live revenue, expenses, net profit, cash, cashflow, balances, suggestions, and alerts.
controls: Sidebar sections: open Sales, Purchases, Expenses, Accounting, AI, and Settings areas
Organization selector: switches active tenant
Notification bell: opens notifications and shows unread count
Profile avatar: opens plan, appearance, language, settings, and logout controls
Cashflow chart: plots receivables, payables, revenue, expenses, and cash
Top expense categories bars: show localized labels and values
steps: Review indicators and follow navigation to details.

description: Search, filter, create, edit, delete, and inspect customer sales invoices.
capabilities: record document status and related accounts
controls: Create Invoice button: opens the shared invoice dialog
Search field: filters by invoice number or customer
Filter button: opens status, customer, and date filters
Clear filters button: resets filters
Invoice row/card: shows number, customer, dates, status, total, and remaining amount
Edit action: opens the selected invoice
Delete action: requests confirmation
Manual Entry tab: enters customer, dates, status, accounts, lines, discount, tax, and totals
Upload Document tab: Pro-only AI extraction from JPEG, PNG, or WebP
New Customer button: opens inline customer creation
Add Line button: appends an invoice line
Create Invoice/Save Draft/Create & Record Payment button: saves according to status
steps: Complete customer, status, account, and line details.

description: Review customers and inspect their invoice and payment activity.
controls: View button: opens the selected customer's activity dialog
Activity tables: show invoices and payments with localized headings and empty states

description: Record customer receipts and review payment history.
controls: Record Payment button: opens the payment dialog
Customer search: selects a customer
Invoice select: optionally targets a specific unpaid invoice
Amount/date/method/reference fields: define the receipt
Record button: posts the payment
Payment search: filters history by customer

description: Search, filter, create, edit, and delete purchase bills using the shared document form.
controls: Create Purchase Bill button: opens the shared document dialog
Search and Filter controls: narrow bills by number, vendor, status, and dates
Edit/Delete actions: modify or remove a bill
New Vendor button: creates a vendor without leaving the form
Document status select: chooses draft, received/open, or paid
Payable account select: chooses the liability or settlement account
Expense account select: chooses or AI-suggests the posting account
Add Line button: adds quantity, unit cost, discount, tax, and total fields
Create Bill/Create & Record Payment button: saves and posts according to status
steps: Complete vendor, accounts, dates, status, and lines.

description: Review vendor contacts and purchase bill/payment activity.
controls: View button: opens vendor activity
Bills table: shows bill, date, status, total, and paid amount
Payments table: shows recorded vendor payments

description: Record vendor payments against bills and review payment history.
controls: Record Payment button: opens the vendor-payment dialog
Vendor search: selects the payee
Bill select: optionally allocates payment to one bill
Amount/date/method/reference fields: define payment
Record button: posts the payment
Vendor filter: searches payment history

description: Create and manage expense-type vendor bills; vendor is optional and accounting accounts remain required.
controls: Create Expense button: opens the shared document dialog
Search and Filter controls: narrow expenses
Optional Vendor section: search, create, change, or omit a vendor
Document status and related account selects: control posting and settlement
Expense account select: chooses or AI-suggests the expense account
Add Line button: adds item/service detail
Create Expense/Create & Record Payment button: saves the expense

description: Shows only vendors linked to expense bills and their expense activity.
controls: View button: opens the vendor's expense bills
Expense bills table: shows bill, date, status, total, and paid amount

description: Hierarchical account tree used by invoices, bills, expenses, journals, and reports, with localized standard account names.
controls: Add Account button: opens account creation
Chevron button: expands or collapses children
Add child icon: preselects the parent and suggests a code
Edit icon: loads account code/name/type/parent
Delete icon: opens confirmation and blocks deletion when records or children exist
Parent account select: controls hierarchy depth up to level four
Type select: uses the parent type for child accounts
Save Changes button: persists the account
steps: Add, edit, or expand an account.

description: Create balanced manual journal entries and receipt/expense vouchers, and inspect generated journal cards and lines.
controls: New Journal Entry button: opens date, description, status, and lines
Expense Voucher button: records payment against vendor bills
Receipt Voucher button: records collection against customer invoices
Account search: finds accounts and supports Quick Add
Add Line button: appends debit/credit line
Balance indicator: prevents save until debit equals credit
Journal card: expands to account lines and totals
Trash button: opens delete confirmation

description: Search and filter journal activity across manual entries, invoices, bills, expenses, and payments.
capabilities: filter by dates, reference type, and account
controls: Search input: filters descriptions
Filter button: opens date, type, and account controls
Clear filters button: resets all filters
Export button: downloads transaction data
Reference type badge: identifies manual, invoice, vendor bill, expense, or payment
Status badge: shows localized posting state

description: Build, preview, save, export, and use report templates. Scheduling and generated scheduled reports require Plus or Pro.
controls: Dashboard tab: shows recent, saved, template, and schedule metrics
Create Report tab: selects report type, dates, grouping, aggregation, sorting, fields, and order
Preview button: generates an on-screen report
Save button: stores configuration
Saved Reports tab: opens, exports, or deletes reports
Templates tab: starts from a predefined report
Scheduled Reports tab: Plus/Pro-only schedule form with frequency, date, time, recipients, and format
Run Now/Pause/Delete controls: manage schedules
Generated Scheduled Reports tab: downloads generated files and shows email delivery
steps: Choose a template or configure a report.

description: Plus/Pro deterministic revenue, expense, and cash-flow forecasts with confidence bands and audit details.
controls: Revenue toggle: shows or hides revenue actual/forecast lines
Expenses toggle: shows or hides expense lines
Cash flow toggle: shows or hides cash flow
Forecast chart: displays localized months, actuals, forecast, today marker, and confidence band
Audit trail cards: explain methods and applied growth
Confidence panel: shows availability, variance, seasonality, and completeness
steps: Toggle series and inspect forecast evidence.

description: Pro-only bilingual finance assistant grounded in tenant data, accounting knowledge, and this product guide.
controls: Message input: accepts Arabic or English questions
Send button: submits the prompt
Suggested prompt buttons: fill common questions
History area: displays user and assistant messages
Upgrade notice: appears when Pro is unavailable
steps: Send and review the grounded answer.

description: Combined user and tenant alerts, including due invoices, organization access changes, support replies, and scheduled report events.
controls: Notification bell: opens this page and displays unread count
Alert rows: show severity icon, localized title/message, and localized date
Automatic read action: marks fetched user and tenant notifications read
Empty state: confirms that all notifications were reviewed

description: Manage profile security, Regular/Plus/Pro subscription, organization data, notification reports, members, permissions, owner actions, and support.
controls: Change password with OTP button: opens password recovery
Plan cards: compare Regular, Plus, and Pro features and prices
Subscribe with Paymob button: starts checkout
Save organization settings button: updates name, industry, and currency
Notification report Pause/Enable button: changes report state
Invitation fields and role select: define a new member
Viewer permission checkboxes: limit dashboard modules
Add member or send invitation button: sends invitation or adds existing user
Deactivate/Reactivate/Remove buttons: control member access
Create another organization button: starts onboarding
Delete organization button: permanently removes tenant data after confirmation
Support form: subject, category, message, and Submit Ticket
Appearance and Language controls are available from the profile menu
steps: Choose a section and update its controls.

description: Submit and review support tickets and administrator replies.
controls: Subject input: summarizes the issue
Category select: chooses technical, account, billing, feature request, or other
Message field: describes the issue
Submit Ticket button: sends the ticket
Ticket cards: show status, date, message, and support reply

description: Platform administration for organizations, plans, users, subscription status, and system statistics.
controls: Organization table: selects an organization for details
Plan controls: create or update subscription plans
Activation control: enables or disables an organization
Delete button: permanently removes an organization after confirmation
Statistics cards and charts: summarize tenants, users, plans, and subscriptions
